vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk ¼Iyktkvksa½ dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ iqy@lajpuk dh yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ vkSj ykxr ¼djksM+ #i, esa½ ftlds fy, vfrfjDr 'kqYd lans; gS yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ ykxr ¼djksM+ksa esa½ fd-eh@pSust 44-005 ¼[ksM+k ftys esa j/kokut xkao ds ikl½ 0-335 56-61 fd-eh-@pSust 92-000 ¼vkuan ftys esa okln xkao ds ikl½ 0-556 94-53 fd-eh-@pSust 92-000 ¼vkuan ftys esa okln xkao ds ikl½ 0-108 55-48 [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@616@lhvks@11&12@thlh vgenkckn&cMksnjk] Ykhuk uUnu] la;qDr lfpo fVIi.kh% fVIi.kh% fVIi.kh% fVIi.kh% ewy vf/klwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti= dk-vk- 2921 ¼v½] rkjh[k 17 fnlEcj] 2012] }kjk izdkf”kr dh xbZ FkhA -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th May, 2016 S.O. 1640(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways bearing S.O. No. 2921(E), dated 17.12.2012, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:— Para 1 (a) and Para 2 after Notes shall be substituted as under: 1. The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plazas for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza(s): (a) For Ahmedabad-Vadodara section of NH 8 from COD Location of Toll Plaza(s)(chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable Km/Ch. 44.005 (Near Radhvanaj village in Kheda District) 50.815 Km/Ch. 92.000 (Near Vasad village in Anand District) 50.486 2. In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bridge(s)/structure(s), cost of which is specified hereunder, at the following Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s)(chainage) Length (in km) and Cost of bridge/structure (in Rupees crore) for which additional fee is payable Length (in kms) Cost (in Crores) Km/Ch. 44.005 (Near Radhvanaj village in Kheda District) 0.335 56.61 Km/Ch. 92.000 (Near Vasad village in Anand District) 0.556 94.53 Km/Ch. 92.000 (Near Vasad village in Anand District) 0.108 55.48 [F. No. NHAI/13013/616/CO/11-12/GC Ahmedabad-Vadodara] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide S.O. 2921(E) dated 17th December.2012. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
